headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Commits $350 Million To Train The Next AI Design Workforce
summary: Autodesk announced a $350 million, multi-year global initiative to expand free access, training, and certification for AI-powered design and manufacturing skills. The program targets 60 million students and educators and aims to train nearly one million individuals in AI-driven workflows. The initiative will run worldwide in partnership with major educational and industrial training institutions. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:ADSK, this move lands at a time when the stock has faced...

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim After Q1 Beat And MaintainX Deal
summary: Autodesk's updated fair value estimate of US$318.53, slightly below the prior US$319.27 level, reflects only a marginal adjustment to the analyst price target framework. This tweak comes as researchers balance solid Q1 results, the planned US$3.6b MaintainX acquisition, and shifting sector multiples against questions on the pace of the core business. As you read on, you will see how these moving parts shape the evolving Autodesk story and what to watch to stay in step with the next round of...

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Raises Borrowing Capacity Through Revolving Credit Facility Adjustments
summary: Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the 10 oversold stocks offering high upside. On June 15, Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) announced adjustments to its existing Revolving Credit Facility. The company increased its borrowing capacity to $2 billion from $1.5 billion, executed with a banking syndicate involving major names such as Citibank, Morgan Stanley, BNP Paribas, and […]

headline: Autodesk Launches $350 Million AI Upskilling Initiative
summary: Autodesk chief marketing and commercial officer Dara Treseder is leading artificial-intelligence adoption both inside and outside the company. Internally, Treseder achieved 100% participation in a new AI Academy, and externally, she highlighted the company's recent $350 million commitment to provide the next generation with AI training, access and credentials.

headline: Health Catalyst, Zoom, and Autodesk Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower.
